arts.ttl: Feyenoord vs. Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, injuries, how to watch & more!
arts.sum: Feyenoord vs Bayern | Predicted lineups [ @kicker ] pic.twitter.com/GNVnobBhIb Bayern Munich has rattled off three straight wins to kick off the new year.

arts.ttl: RC Lens tires of waiting for Bayern Munich’s Daniel Peretz, moves on
arts.sum: RC Lens have moved on from Daniel Peretz and signed Mathew Ryan instead, after the Bayern goalkeeper rejected a move pic.twitter.com/ZY3ZmIBRYe Peretz’s reluctance pushed RC Lens into signing AS Roma goalkeeper Mathew Ryan.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich shocked at Daniel Peretz’ RC Lens rejection
arts.sum: It’s known that Bayern Munich wish to loan Daniel Peretz out before the end of the month, but the Israeli goalkeeper has rejected a move to French side RC Lens.…

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich, Alphonso Davies agree on all details for new deal, announcement expected soon
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and the camp for Alphonso Davies appear to be done their dance...with the end result being a new deal for the Canadian star. Now, the focus should turn to the respective signings of Jamal Musiala, Joshua Kimmich, and Leroy Sané.

arts.ttl: Priske’s Feyenoord work around two new injuries: “Puzzle is the right word, yes”
arts.sum: Brian Priske spoke earnestly to the press, bringing up two new injuries ahead of Feyenoord's Champions League clash with Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich confirm Tom Bischof signing: “Everything it takes to establish himself at the highest level.”
arts.sum: Shortly after passing his club medical this morning, Germany U21 international Tom Bischof was officially unveiled as a future Bayern Munich player by Germany’s record champions. As expected, the 19-year-old…

arts.ttl: Report: Former Bayern Munich campus coach Erik ten Hag a candidate at Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: According to a report from Sky Sport journalist Florian Plettenberg, former Bayern Munich campus coach Erik ten Hag is a candidate to replace Nuri Sahin should Borussia Dortmund let him go: ⚫️ Despite other reports, Erik ten Hag remains a candidate for Borussia Dortmund should Nuri #Sahin be dismissed.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala’s new Bayern Munich contract to be sorted out by February
arts.sum: The uncertainty surrounding Jamal Musiala’s new Bayern Munich contract could now finally be resolved as both parties are nearing the end of this saga that shouldn’t have been too difficult, release clause notwithstanding. A move away from Bayern was never an option for the 21-year-old, and despite interest from abroad, his priority has always been FC Bayern A few details still need to be sorted, especially of a legal nature.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid have ‘given up’ on signing Alphonso Davies from Bayern Munich
arts.sum: The longest transfer saga of the January transfer window seems to have drawn to a conclusion. It appears Real Madrid target Alphonso Davies will remain a Bayern Munich player beyond…

arts.ttl: Tom Bischof to join Bayern Munich from Hoffenheim from 2025/26 season
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have agreed to sign promising Germany U20 international midfielder Tom Bischof on a free transfer from Hoffenheim from summer 2025. He's already gained a lot of experience at professional level at the age of 19, in the Bundesliga, DFB Cup and Europa League," said Bayern's sporting director Christoph Freund of the inbound midfielder.
